chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4933 - وَ رُوِيَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ: "أَنَّ اَلْحَيْفَ فِي اَلْوَصِيَّةِ مِنَ اَلْكَبَائِرِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4933 - And it has been narrated in another report: "Indeed, injustice in a will is among the major sins."
